text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just now, a journalist interviewing me said she
admired how I "always live up to expectations."

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Many from my family also expect me to achieve
our long-standing dream... To be honest, I never
imagined I'd be running under such pressure...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Which makes winning all the more worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to give everyone a chance to see this
diamond shining in first place. ♪
